en.extract:
The golden-bellied warbler has been split into two species:

Cuzco warbler, Myiothlypis chrysogaster
Choco warbler, Myiothlypis chlorophrys
en.wikitext:
The '''golden-bellied warbler''' has been split into two species:
* [[Cuzco warbler]], ''Myiothlypis chrysogaster''
* [[Choco warbler]], ''Myiothlypis chlorophrys''
